steps.title: Identify the progression
steps.content: The text opens with Shannon's standing, describes his work, then closes with a colleague's comment about its historical significance.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: Choice B captures the flow: introduces a respected researcher, describes an aspect of his work, and suggests why the work is historically significant through Gallagher's quote. The other choices misidentify what the text emphasizes—treating it as concept-centered (A), career-centered (C), or paper-first (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
